highlights_headline: Merges upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and resolves a native resource leak in SKImage.

bullets.lead: Upstream Skia m151 bug fixes merged
bullets.detail: Pulls in the latest chrome/m151 upstream bug fixes, keeping the bundled renderer aligned with the Chromium milestone 151 branch.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData
bullets.detail: Calling SKImage.FromEncodedData with an SKRectI subset no longer leaks the underlying native image handle when the subset operation fails or the result is discarded.
